name: Battle Beast
description:
✦After escaping the Viltrumite's prison and killing one of the Viltrumite Executioner, Battle Beast was left floating aimlessly in the vacuum of space before finding an alien planet. Landing on the planet, he found a village and hope that the villager would know a way for him to return to his home.
